title: Bray & Cyber's Better, Fresher 3D Books
description: A collaboration pack between Bray and Cyber to make 3D book models for all enchanted book variations!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fb52a722ba351024023c7cc8d28c6c3571f067a.png)

-------------

<center>

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf179c422b60ee07e444fbf7bc4631e768aa3f95.png)

## What is Better, Fresher 3D Books!?

</center>

This resource pack is a collaboration between [Bray](https://modrinth.com/user/Braytonks) and [Cyber](https://modrinth.com/user/cyberia) to expand on "Bray's Better Books" and make unique 3D models for every enchantment in the game with lots of neat details and animated effects!

By design, you will see the 2D sprite of the book when it is in your Inventory, in an Item Frame or on the ground. When you hold the book in your right hand you will see an opened-book variant and when you hold it in your left hand it will be closed, offering even more variety and nuance.

Now you can find your enchanted books at a glance and look good doing it :)

----------------

### 2D Book Sprites by Bray: [Bray's Better Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brays-better-books)
![BooksDisplay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34fdc2ca1c9cebc735c09e22ab3616041dac6fdc.png)

## IMPORTANT:
For this pack to work with Minecraft 1.20.1, 1.21 or 1.21.1 you will need to use [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) and [Pommel](https://modrinth.com/mod/pommel-held-item-models)

## "Will you make this pack available for older versions of Minecraft?"

Due to the constraints of Vanilla Minecraft, this pack will only function as intended in Minecraft 1.21.5 and above, or any version of Minecraft supported by Pommel and CIT Resewn.

If you'd like, you can choose to use ONLY the 2D book sprites in a larger number of Minecraft versions by downloading [**Bray's Better Books**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brays-better-books) **(Older versions of Minecraft may require a CIT mod like Optifine or CIT Resewn)**

## "I have suggestions to make or found a bug! Where do I go?"

If you have ideas to share, you found a bug or you just want to connect with a community, you can join us on Discord!

[**Bray's World Discord**](https://discord.gg/H7JPX6hPQB)

[**Cyber's Minecraft Refreshed Discord**](https://discord.gg/qYmm3UGPsy)

</details>
